Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Mon ami, I understand what you are trying to ask. But please also understand that this is difficile for me to talk about.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Even though a return is all that mon coeur yearns for, France has no room for someone like me. And this is something that haunts my days.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: The best I can do is build mes petits monuments and treat myself with the smells of home, like la lavande that you must have noticed by now.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: But thinking about it more than that is ... well, it hurts a lot.

Line.Text: I know that this sounds very, erm, hypocrite because I am forcing my home upon the rest of you, with all les drapeaux and very French décor, and even the waftings of ma cuisine. But the easiest way I can explain it to you is that I want to be French, without being too reminded of it.

Choices.Text: You should really try to sort out whatever this is. Have you thought that maybe you don't have company because you mope around too much?
If you need to get something off your chest, I'd be willing to hear you out.
